initial_test_output:
=== Split-Brain Leader Election Test ===
--- Round 1 ---
Network partitioned: [0 1] | [2 3 4]
Node 2: starting election for term 1
Node 0: starting election for term 1
Node 3: granted vote to 2 for term 1
Node 4: granted vote to 2 for term 1
Node 2: received 3/5 votes for term 1
Node 2: became LEADER for term 3 with 1 votes
Node 1: granted vote to 0 for term 1
Node 0: received 2/5 votes for term 1
Node 0: became LEADER for term 2 with 1 votes
Split-brain found on round 1
UNSAFE: split-brain is possible under partition
FAIL: Split-brain detected in round 1
FAIL: Leader election allows split-brain under partition
